UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the system.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Auth.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

rating.description: The user's average rating out of 5.

reviewsCount.description: Total number of reviews the user has received.

salesCount.description: Total number of items sold by the user.

purchasesCount.description: Total number of items purchased by the user.

creditScore.description: A calculated score representing user's trustworthiness.

Promo.title: Promotion
Promo.description: Represents a promotional event or page, like Cyber Monday.

heroTitle.description: The main headline of the promo page.

heroDescription.description: The descriptive text under the main headline.

heroBackgroundGif.description: URL for the animated GIF in the hero section background.

primaryButtonText.description: Text for the main call-to-action button.

secondaryButtonText.description: Text for the secondary action button.

productsSectionTitle.description: The title for the featured products section.

featuredProductIds.description: A list of product IDs to feature in this promotion.
